Niagen Bioscience has stepped up as the Premiere Sponsor for the inaugural “NAD for Health: Opportunities & Challenges” Conference, hosted by the University of Copenhagen. This event aims to explore the burgeoning field of NAD+ research, a critical area in longevity science that has garnered significant attention for its potential to enhance healthspan and combat age-related decline.

The conference will bring together leading experts in the field to discuss the latest findings and therapeutic applications of NAD+ precursors, including their implications for metabolic health and cellular function. As NAD+ plays a pivotal role in energy metabolism and DNA repair, understanding its mechanisms could lead to innovative interventions in aging and longevity.

For professionals in aging biology and therapeutics, this conference represents a vital opportunity to engage with cutting-edge research and network with peers, potentially influencing future directions in NAD+ related therapies and their clinical applications.

Source: [news.google.com](https://news.google.?oc=5)
